metadata.name: Detect Gas Leak in Utility Network

description: A methane sensor in a gas utility pipeline reports a significant leak. An operator must initiate an emergency response.

nodes.task_description: Receive a 'Gas Leak Detected' alert with a specific location from a pipeline sensor.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent acknowledges the critical safety alert.

nodes.task_description: Remotely shut off the gas valves on either side of the leak to isolate the section.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully operates the valves to stop the flow of gas.

nodes.task_description: Dispatch a gas utility repair crew and the fire department to the location.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent dispatches both utility and emergency response teams.
